items.title: Migrate portfolio/position display to server-truth ledger
Finalize Kraken open-orders/order-status normalization contract and fixtures
Build E2E manual trade flow harness (intent, dispatch, lifecycle, reconcile, UI)
Implement production observability package with alerts and SLO thresholds
Finalize hosted secrets/credential lifecycle (vault/KMS, rotation, audit)
Complete fail-closed operator runbooks for recovery and incidents
Run alpha readiness dry-run (48-72h) and go/no-go checklist signoff
